query: INSERT INTO request_metadata_event_receipts (event_id, request_id, event_sha256, status, observed_at) SELECT $1, $2, $3, 'pending'::request_metadata_event_receipt_status, $4 WHERE $4 >= now() - make_interval(days => $5) AND $4 <= now() + make_interval(mins => $6) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM usage_facts WHERE id = $1 OR request_id = $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING event_id
